creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

  Changes:	https://ja.wordpress.org/2015/08/19/billie/

  - Clarify LICENSE
  - Switch to options helpers

  japanese/wordpress: update to 4.3.1

  This release fixing multiple security vulnerabilities.
